raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding a dispute involving a {$3900.00} purchase of a XXXX XXXX snowblower ( S/N : XXXX ) from XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, charged XXXX XXXX Citi XXXX XXXX ( account ending XXXX ) on XX/XX/XXXX. 
Citibank initially denied my dispute based on the merchants claim that the damage was caused by impact during client operation. That claim is directly contradicted by the merchants own prior written communications. 
On January 29, 2026 months before this chargeback was filed XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX submitted a formal written communication to American Honda Motor Co.s Senior District Sales Manager and XXXX XXXX XXXX explicitly stating : We believe this is an XXXX housing alignment issue rather than a setup or misuse condition. In a separate formal rebuttal to XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX the merchant wrote : This is not a setup issue. This is not a XXXX issue. The damage on his unit is a direct consequence of a condition that left the factory floor. 
The merchants position changed only after the chargeback created direct financial liability for them. They told XXXX XXXX it was a factory defect. They told Citibank it was operator error. These are irreconcilable statements made to different parties for different financial purposes. 
Following my prior CFPB complaint ( Case # XXXX ), XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX dispute on XX/XX/XXXX and issued a conditional credit of {$3900.00}, acknowledging the matter warranted further review. However, the credit remains conditional for 30 days pending the merchants response. 
I am concerned that the merchant will submit the same unsupported operator impact claim to Citibank that directly contradicts their own documented written statements. I have submitted the contradicting evidence proactively to XXXX ( Citi XXXX : XXXX ). 
Additional supporting facts : XXXX  own internal Quality Alert ( dated XX/XX/XXXX ) documents an uncontrolled factory assembly condition causing XXXX housing misalignment on this exact model XXXX previously approved a warranty claim for the identical failure on the identical model ( Case XXXX, approved XX/XX/XXXX ) The unit failed after only XXXX hours of normal residential use The unit remains unrepaired and out of my possession after XXXX months I was forced to purchase a competing brand out of pocket to get through the winter I am requesting that the CFPB note the merchants contradictory statements in its records and monitor the final resolution of the Citibank dispute XXXX ensure the conditional credit of {$3900.00} is made permanent.
